title: MacEduFault V2
description: Subscriber milestone pack for MacEdu (1000 subscribers)
body:
### Textures
This Resource Pack is made for Bedwars and has most of the custom textures are specifically made for that gamemode. Other textures are from 1.14 Texture Update.
### Versions
This Resource Pack is made with the version format of 1 so it should work with the versions between 1.6.1 and 1.8.9
### Credits
[MacEdu](https://www.youtube.com/@ignmacedu 'MacEdu') and [wilkyy](https://www.youtube.com/@wilkyyb 'wilkyy')
